title: ProjectScanMethod
description: Contract for project.scan JSON-RPC method. Starts a long-running read-only project scan; progress arrives via operation.progress notifications.

projectId.description: ID of the projects row to scan

ProjectScanResponse.title: ProjectScanResponse
ProjectScanResponse.description: Immediate response — the scan runs asynchronously. Errors: validation_error (1001) projectId not found; conflict_error (1005) project already being scanned.

operationId.description: ID of the created scan operation; use with operation.progress notifications and operation.cancel
